rationale: The cited paper focuses on pre/postpromotion dips and flexible lead–lag promotion modeling in weekly store-level scanner data, while the citing paper’s stated contributions center on cross-national long-run line-length, price, and distribution elasticities using monthly brand-level error-correction models. Because the only linkage provided is a DOI match (no in-text citation context), it is not safe to treat this as an obvious mention-only citation, but the current evidence is also insufficient to clearly mark it as substantively central.
